menu.name: Mod Options
menu.desc: Options that are for the mod.

checkbox.name: Southern Seasons
checkbox.desc: If this is checked the game will use the southern hemisphere season order rather than the northern one.

checkbox.name: Disable Particles
checkbox.desc: Pretty self explanatory, if this is checked then the particles you see in the main menu will not appear in the song, turn this on if you experience lag spikes which may be related to this.

choice.name: Soul Trait
choice.desc: Whenever the soul appears it will appear in the selected trait and it's respective color.

checkbox.name: Kill Frisk
checkbox.desc: if you want to kill frisk you lame fucking bitch

checkbox.name: Botplay
checkbox.desc: ok why isnt this a feature in base codename man

checkbox.name: Disable Hud Script
checkbox.desc: i couldnt get this to work?? lol
